headline: Will Calavo Deal Transform Mission Produce's Growth Trajectory?
summary: AVO plans to acquire Calavo Growers to expand avocado sourcing, add new produce categories and build a diversified fresh-produce platform.

headline: Ascribe Announces Collaboration with Corteva to Advance Seed Treatment Use for Phytalix® Biofungicide
summary: ITHACA, N.Y., March 05, 2026--Ascribe Bio and Corteva announce an R&D collaboration to advance novel biofungicide seed treatments.

raw.headline: Ascribe Announces Collaboration with Corteva to Advance Seed Treatment Use for Phytalix® Biofungicide

headline: Corteva Announces Dates for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Webcast
summary: Corteva, Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) today announced it will release its first quarter 2026 earnings on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, after the stock market close via press release and its website. The earnings will be presented in a live webcast on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
